description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsBlack top, has a V neckline with piping detail around it and on the placket, three quarter translucent sleeves with elasticated cuffs and body linedMaterial and Care100% polyester Machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
